3 cards appeared in every deck produced by the single deterministic heuristic recipe: Spiced Saison, Spiced Ranch Water, City Spritz. This is retained as a **deck-diversity warning**, not treated as proof of mandatory inclusion across the metagame, because Prompt 10 implements one heuristic recipe rather than exhaustive optimal deck search or human deck telemetry.
